description: Skill instructs Claude to read AGENTS.md, write agent_docs files, and run npm/git Bash commands but declares no allowed-tools in frontmatter
suggested_fix: Add `allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Bash` to the frontmatter to match the tools actually used in the skill body

description: Orchestrator's Step 1 reads docs/research-*.md, docs/PRD-*.md, docs/TechDesign-*.md, and AGENTS.md but no Read or Glob tools are declared in frontmatter
suggested_fix: Add `allowed-tools: Read, Glob` (at minimum) to the frontmatter; add Write if workflow state updates are needed

description: PostToolUse hook concatenates tool_input.file_path directly into an execSync shell command string; a crafted filename with shell metacharacters can execute arbitrary commands
suggested_fix: Escape the file path using a shell-quoting library (e.g. shell-quote) or use execFile with an argument array to avoid shell interpretation entirely

description: Notification hook concatenates d.message into osascript/notify-send/PowerShell command strings without sanitization; crafted message content can inject shell commands
suggested_fix: Strip or escape shell metacharacters from msg before interpolation, or use execFile with argument arrays instead of shell command strings

description: No model field declared in frontmatter; consumers cannot determine intended model tier
suggested_fix: Add `model: claude-sonnet` (or preferred family name) to the frontmatter

description: Zero example invocation blocks; no input/output pair shows how the skill behaves when triggered
suggested_fix: Add at least one example block showing a user trigger phrase and the expected skill output

description: Vague quantifiers: 'relevant' (line 29), 'brief' (line 41), 'minimal' (line 63) give no measurable criteria for what qualifies
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete criteria, e.g. 'the agent_docs/ file matching the current phase' instead of 'relevant agent_docs/ files'
